data.title: An address withdrew about 940,000 $OM from Binance, worth $7.9 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain data shows that about 4 minutes ago, an address withdrew 939,999.56 $OM from Binance, worth US$7,905,396.30.

data.title: Greeks.Live: The community is bullish on Ethereum, but there are concerns that it may fall back to $2,600
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.Live macro researcher Adam released a Chinese community briefing, which disclosed that Ethereum is generally bullish and believes that it is expected to hit $4,000 after breaking through $2,800. Some believe that breaking through $2,750 under low liquidity over the weekend shows a strong momentum, but there are also concerns that it may fall back to $2,600. The options market shows a negative Gamma state in the $2,700-3,900 range, which means that volatility may increase. Market makers need Delta hedging at the current position, and the rally may continue. In terms of market structure, there is a lack of resistance to rapid growth.

data.title: Bybit raised 254,830 ETH in 48 hours after hack
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to updated data released by Spot On Chain, Bybit raised 254,830 ETH (US$693 million) within 48 hours after the hacker attack, including: 
132,178 ETH (US$367 million), which may have been obtained through OTC transactions with Galaxy Digital, FalconX and Wintermute; 
122,652 ETH (US$326 million), loans from trading platforms/institutions such as Bitget, MEXC, Binance and DWF Labs (it may also be personal borrowing behavior of some whales). 
At the same time, hackers have exchanged 40,944 ETH (US$115 million) across chains for BTC and other assets through Chainflip, THORChain, LiFi, DLN and eXch. The hacker currently still holds 458,451 ETH ($1.29 billion), accounting for about 91.7% of the stolen 499,395 ETH ($1.4 billion).

data.title: LBank is now online on VK Official (KOHLI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched VK Official (KOHLI) at 17:30 (SGT) on February 23, and opened the KOHLI/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 17:00 on February 24.

data.title: Solana Foundation: Tokens will not really disappear if they have a community, and PayFi application scenarios are the white whale of the crypto industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Solana Foundation executives said at the Consensus Hong Kong Conference that PayFi's application scenarios are huge and it is the White Whale of the crypto industry. If the goal of each blockchain is to become a global financial infrastructure, then the core goal of these technology stacks and industries is to create a financial layer that can be used by 5.5 billion people with Internet access. Once a token has a community, it means that it will not really disappear. For example, Ethereum Classic or projects like Bitcoin Gold and Bitcoin Diamond that are rarely mentioned continue to have huge market capitalizations because of their community size and long-term vitality. PayFi's vision is to make payments in economic activities, that is, to exchange tokens for services, which has not yet been truly realized. (Hong Kong Wen Wei Po)

data.title: Michael Saylor Comments On Bitcoin Tracker Updates
data.description: According to PANews, MicroStrategy founder Michael Saylor has shared new insights regarding Bitcoin Tracker updates. Saylor remarked, "I don't think this reflects what I did last week." Historically, MicroStrategy has disclosed its Bitcoin acquisitions the day after such announcements.

data.title: Michael Saylor releases Bitcoin Tracker chart, suspected to disclose holdings next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) founder Michael Saylor once again released a Bitcoin Tracker-related chart. He said: "I don't think this reflects what I did last week." According to previous rules, Strategy always discloses information about increasing its holdings of Bitcoin the day after the relevant news is released.

data.title: Community Cautiously Optimistic Amid Key Resistance Level
data.description: According to Odaily, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam has released a briefing in the English community, revealing that members remain cautiously optimistic while closely monitoring the critical resistance level of $99,000. Although some members anticipate a price increase in March, recent hacking incidents and a low volatility environment have prompted active discussions on how to protect against downside risks. Following recent events, options skew has normalized, and yesterday's put options trading volume decreased by 50%. Options with the same strike price have been significantly repriced, with prices rising by 40-80% compared to the previous day.

Greeks.live: The community is closely watching the key resistance level of Bitcoin at $99,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released an English community briefing, which disclosed that community members remain cautiously bullish, but closely follow the key resistance level of $99,000. Although some members expect prices to rise in March, considering the recent hacking incidents and the low volatility environment, they are currently actively discussing how to protect downside risks. Option skew has normalized after recent events. Yesterday's put option trading volume fell by 50%, and options with the same strike price showed a significant repricing, with prices rising by 40-80% compared to the previous day.
